message:
feat(extensions-js): improve module resolution with classified errors and broader extension support

Module resolver improvements:
- Extract canonical_node_builtin() for clearer Node.js built-in aliasing
  with proper node: prefix normalization for all 21 supported modules
- Classified error messages: network imports, bare package specifiers,
  and unknown specifiers each get distinct, descriptive error strings
  via is_network_specifier()/is_bare_package_specifier() helpers

File resolution improvements:
- Directory index resolution now checks index.tsx, index.mjs, and
  index.json in addition to index.ts and index.js
- Extension fallback for .js/.mjs files now tries .tsx alongside .ts
- Bare path resolution expanded to try .tsx, .mjs, and .json extensions

New tests:
- resolver_error_messages_are_classified_deterministically
- resolve_module_path_uses_documented_candidate_order (tempdir-based
  filesystem test verifying .ts > .js precedence and .json fallback)
- pijs_dynamic_import_reports_deterministic_package_error

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
